enrichment method: incubated with 240 μl slurry of anti-HA affinity matrix beads
fractionation method: Proteins were stacked in the top of a SDS-PAGE gel
fragmentation method: Tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) based proteomic analyses
instrument: online nanoLC-MS/MS (UltiMate 3000 and LTQ-Orbitrap Velos Pro, Thermo Scientific)
labeling: Using a proteomics approach, we identified CFP1 associated proteins
